title: The River Cuts A Channel
content:
People with money but no fortune
        or stomach for the life of an albatross,
        watch him soar on self-made wings,
        fetch the dingy redness
        of morning's first catch with
        a long necked bottle
        he calls the captain
meaning:
This evocative piece by Paul Cameron Brown, titled "The River Cuts A Channel", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
